name: TECO 2030 ASA
summary: TECO 2030 ASA, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an engineering and equipment development company for the maritime industry worldwide. It offers TECO Marine Fuel Cell, a modular hydrogen proton exchange membrane fuel cell system primarily designed for heavy-duty marine applications offering emission free propulsion by using hydrogen as fuel; TECO Future Funnel to avoid dry dock; and TECO Ballast Water Treatment System, which is used to prevent invasive species and health issues. The company was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway.
